    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    N

    name - Variable in class component.scene1.CharacterPane
    Display name of the represented character.
    name - Variable in class logic.entity.Character
    Display name of the character.
    nameLabel - Variable in class component.scene2.HealthBar
     
    names - Variable in class component.scene1.CharacterPane
    Reserved name list (currently unused).
    NotAttacking - Enum constant in enum class logic.gameLogic.AttackState
    Character is idle and can start a new attack.
